name: run-lint
description: Run the linter for the detected stack. Auto-detects ruff/flake8 (Python), eslint/biome (Node), golangci-lint/go vet (Go), clippy (Rust), dotnet build /warnaserror (C#).

fix.description: Advisory hint: if true, the calling agent should invoke the linter's auto-fix variant directly (e.g. ruff check --fix, eslint --fix) rather than using make lint.
